name: Sylvie's Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix until well combined and the consistency is similar to ranch dressing.
3. If the mixture is too thick, gradually add more olive oil until desired texture is achieved.
4. This recipe makes approximately 1-1/2 cups, which serves about 24 portions.
5. Nutritional information per serving: 72.6 calories; 7.4 grams fat; 0.9 milligrams cholesterol; 26.2 milligrams sodium; 90% of calories from fat.
